Brand · navy + lime

The Static palette. Navy is the canvas — sovereign, immovable. Lime is the one partner that does the work — headline emphasis, primary CTAs, the in-boundary semantic. One accent per surface. Never two saturated colours together.

Navy scale · canvas
Navy 1000#060B17
Navy 900#0A1224
Navy 800#111A33
Navy 700#18233F
Navy 600#1F2D4D
Navy 500#2A3B63
Lime · the accent
Lime 700#8EB31E
Lime 600#A6CC2E
Lime 500#C7F23F
Lime 400#D5F76A
Lime 300#E0F895
Lime 100#F3FBD4
